1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
10 Plate I Y T
10 Plate Shoulder Press
10 Squat Jump
15 Calf Raise
If catching up, talk to the coach for a warm up relevant to your movement

strength.name: Clean and Jerk
strength.description:
1x1 | Clean does not need to hit depth. This does not mean Power Clean as high as you can. Still get low! | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 1 @ 90%
15:00 1 @ 95%
18:00-28:00 1RM Attempts

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address horizontal pull and posterior chain neglected by vertical pressing and rowing, maintain movement balance.
suggested_exercises: Bulgarian Split Squats (light): 3 x 8 per leg

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Clean and Jerk, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: 2k Row. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on Back (mid/rear), Biceps, Glutes.
